name: NIDS Forms a Scientific Advisory Board for Anomalous-Phenomena Research
summary: The National Institute for Discovery Science assembled a multidisciplinary scientific advisory board to investigate UFO reports and other anomalous phenomena. Hal Puthoff, Eric Davis, and Jacques Vallée became part of the research network that later intersected with Bigelow-supported UAP programs.
